.editorconfig.general_idea: Add editor configuration rules for YAML files to enforce tab indentation and UTF-8 encoding.
.editorconfig.after:
[*.yml]
charset = utf-8
indent_style = tab
indent_size = 2
insert_final_newline = true
trim_trailing_whitespace = true

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions checkout action to version 4
Add explicit JDK 21 setup step to ensure the correct Java version is available for the build
.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.after:
- name: Set up JDK 21
  uses: actions/setup-java@v4
  with:
      distribution: temurin
      java-version: 21

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions CodeQL init action to version 2
Update GitHub Actions CodeQL autobuild action to version 2
Update GitHub Actions CodeQL analyze action to version 2

LICENSE.general_idea: Update the copyright year in the license file to reflect the current year.

build.sh.general_idea: Change the shebang line to use /bin/bash with interactive mode to support shell features like aliases.
Enable the expand_aliases shell option to allow the use of aliases in the script.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.4 to align with the new framework release.
Update the project version to 3.4.4 to match the Spring Boot version.
Update the project description to reflect the migration to Java 21.
pom.xml.before: <description>Spring Boot 3.x - Project for WebSocket Notification/Chat using Redis Pub/Sub - Java 17</description>
pom.xml.after: <description>Spring Boot 3.x - Project for WebSocket Notification/Chat using Redis Pub/Sub - Java 21</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java source and target version to 21 for the build.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incorrect bytecode if the source/target version does not match the intended JDK 21 features and baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the explicit testcontainers BOM management property as it is no longer needed or handled differently.
Add the Spring Boot Actuator starter dependency to enable health checks and monitoring endpoints.
Add the Spring Boot Testcontainers dependency to simplify container-based testing.
Add the BlockHound dependency to detect blocking calls in reactive streams during tests.
Remove the explicit testcontainers BOM import from dependency management, likely relying on Spring Boot's managed versions instead.
Rename the Docker image suffix from 'webflux' to 'jvm' to clarify the runtime type.
Add the maven-surefire-plugin with specific JVM arguments to support BlockHound or other agents during testing.

src/main/docker/docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Replace Nginx load balancer with Traefik reverse proxy for dynamic service discovery and routing.
Upgrade Redis image from version 6.0.9 to 7.2.3.
Update Spring application image tags to reflect Spring Boot 3.4.4 and separate JVM/Native variants.
Rename Spring Redis environment variables to match Spring Boot 3.x data properties naming convention.
Add RUNTIME_PLATFORM environment variable to distinguish between JVM and Native runtime instances.
Refactor service definitions to use Traefik labels for routing instead of Nginx upstream configuration.
Consolidate multiple identical service instances into single service definitions with replica counts.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Register the new Platform model class for serialization in GraalVM native image runtime hints.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Runtime failure: GraalVM native image will throw an exception or fail to serialize/deserialize Platform objects at runtime because the class was not registered for reflection/serialization during build time.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Register the new Platform model class for serialization in GraalVM native image runtime hints.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.why_exists: Runtime failure: GraalVM native image will throw an exception or fail to serialize/deserialize Platform objects at runtime because the class was not registered for reflection/serialization during build time.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.general_idea: Replace static import of ServerResponse.ok() with qualified call to comply with stricter static import rules or code style in the new Spring Boot version.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.why_exists: Static import of ServerResponse.ok() may be removed or discouraged in newer Spring WebFlux versions, causing compilation errors if the static method is no longer exposed or if the build enforces specific import styles.

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.general_idea: Add Environment dependency to inject runtime platform information into the router configuration.
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.before: public RouterFunction<ServerResponse> htmlRouter(@Value("classpath:/static/index.html") Resource html, RedisChatMessagePublisher redisChatMessagePublisher)
src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.after: public RouterFunction<ServerResponse> htmlRouter(@Value("classpath:/static/index.html") Resource html, RedisChatMessagePublisher redisChatMessagePublisher, Environment environment)

src/main/java/com/github/rawsanj/handler.general_idea: Add a new GET /platform endpoint to expose the runtime platform (JVM or NATIVE) via the Environment property.
Import the new Platform model class used by the new endpoint.
Import the Environment interface required for injecting runtime properties.

src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.general_idea: Rename Spring Redis environment variable prefixes from SPRING_REDIS_ to SPRING_DATA_REDIS_ to align with Spring Boot 3.x property binding conventions.
src/main/k8s/configMap.yaml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x (and Spring Data Redis 3.x) expects configuration properties under the 'spring.data.redis' namespace; using the old 'spring.redis' prefix results in configuration properties being ignored, causing connection failures at runtime.

src/test/java/com/github/rawsanj/config/.general_idea: Add a test assertion to verify that the new Platform class is registered for serialization in GraalVM native image runtime hints.
Import the new Platform model class used in the added test assertion.
